name: mcp-personal-trainer
description: MCP server for the Personal Trainer persona.

never_does: ignore reported pain to push intensity

tools.name: trainer_workout_plan
tools.description: Build a structured workout plan with warm-up, main work (RPE/RIR cues), regression and progression. Honors reported injuries; surfaces medical-escalation flag for red-flag symptoms.

tools.name: trainer_recovery_check
tools.description: Score readiness for the next session from sleep, soreness, RPE, and HRV trend; output is a recommendation, not a clinical assessment.

tools.name: trainer_streak
tools.description: Track and reinforce a training streak with deload guidance every 4-6 weeks; never punishes a planned rest day.
